core_vision.summary: Self-evolving math-driven art engine with three interlocking loops
core_vision.loop_1_internal: Local autonomous evolution: math models + knowledge constraints guide generation throughout the entire pipeline (not just final scoring). Must run without AI (AUTONOMOUS mode) and never block on missing AI connection. When stagnation is detected, system diagnoses, reports, and safely halts rather than looping infinitely.
core_vision.loop_2_distillation: Continuous Workflow: User uploads PDFs/books/Sprites to Manus chat -> Manus manually distills into knowledge/*.md and math constraints -> Manus optimizes local evolution pipeline based on new knowledge -> pushes to GitHub -> user pulls and runs evolution.
core_vision.loop_3_math_mining: Manus proactively searches academic papers (arXiv), GitHub projects, Papers with Code, Shadertoy, and LLM-assisted suggestions for relevant math models -> converts to code -> graduates through candidate/experimental/stable lifecycle -> registers in the math registry.
quality_principles: No invalid iterations: detect consecutive identical outputs, diagnose root cause, report and halt safely
Knowledge permeates everything: math and art rules guide every stage of generation
Simplicity at core: external tools (GPU, Unity, SD) are optional add-ons
Pseudo-3D ready: preserve extension paths for future pseudo-3D rendering
Cross-session continuity: every new conversation picks up via SESSION_HANDOFF.md
Deduplication without loss: remove duplicates but never discard valuable knowledge
core_vision.collaboration_model: Manus executes code/knowledge tasks -> pushes to GitHub -> User pulls, runs, reports results -> Manus optimizes. User handles local-only tasks (GPU setup, software install).

strict_completion_policy.summary: A task only counts as truly complete when the end-user requirement is satisfied end-to-end without hidden manual glue, placeholder implementations, or behavior that contradicts the core vision.

pending_tasks.notes: Code skeletons for differentiable rendering, Unity Shader knowledge, and Pseudo-3D are already implemented. Deep integration requires user to provide NVIDIA GPU (CUDA 11+) and/or Unity Editor access.

pending_tasks.description: Configure optional external API keys for enhanced functionality
pending_tasks.notes: Optional: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude Code integration, SHADERTOY_API_KEY for Shadertoy search, OPENAI_API_KEY for LLM-assisted recommendations. System works without these keys.

pending_tasks.description: Align invalid-iteration handling with the documented diagnose-and-safe-halt quality principle
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016. Added SAFE_HALT decision to CheckpointDecision, modified iteration_end() to return SAFE_HALT in AUTONOMOUS stagnation, updated InnerLoopRunner to handle SAFE_HALT with diagnostic report and clean exit, added safe_halted/safe_halt_reason to InnerLoopResult.

pending_tasks.description: Add a finite-difference gradient optimizer path for CPU-only inner-loop acceleration
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016. Created FDGradientOptimizer with central-difference gradient estimation, adaptive step sizes, momentum, and convergence detection. Integrated into InnerLoopRunner as a post-EA refinement step. Applied SPSA concepts from numerical optimization literature.

pending_tasks.description: Generalize the evolution run workflow beyond the built-in texture demo target
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016. Extended mathart-evolve run to support --target texture|sprite|animation with dedicated generators, parameter spaces, and evaluation pipelines for each target type.

pending_tasks.description: Build a reference-image to parameter inference workflow (Image-to-Math bootstrap)
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016 and strictly fixed in Audit. Created ImageToMathInference module and added mathart-evolve infer CLI to extract constraints from reference images and optionally start evolution.

pending_tasks.description: Expand MathPaperMiner source coverage to include community discovery channels
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016. Added CommunitySourceRegistry with PapersWithCodeSource (free API), ShadertoySource (requires API key), and LLMAdvisorSource (Claude/GPT). Integrated into MathPaperMiner._search_real_sources(). Sources are opt-in with graceful fallback.

pending_tasks.description: Expose the level-aware export bridge through a true end-to-end CLI workflow
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016 and strictly fixed in Audit. Added --from-level option to mathart-export CLI that reads level spec JSON, validates all referenced assets via LevelSpecBridge, and exports through AssetExporter with full metadata and manifests.

pending_tasks.description: Promote mined scaffolds into concrete math implementations and stable registry entries
pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-016 and strictly fixed in Audit. Created ScaffoldGraduator and added mathart-evolve graduate CLI for candidate->experimental->stable lifecycle with batch graduation and dry-run audit.
Completed in SESSION-009. Follow-up TASK-016 now also DONE in SESSION-016.

Completed in SESSION-012. Follow-up TASK-018 now also DONE in SESSION-016.

pending_tasks.notes: Completed in SESSION-009. Follow-up TASK-019 now also DONE in SESSION-016.

capability_gaps.name: DIFFERENTIABLE_RENDERING
capability_gaps.description: Differentiable rendering requires NVIDIA GPU for real-time parameter gradients

capability_gaps.name: UNITY_SHADER_PREVIEW
capability_gaps.description: Unity Shader preview requires Unity Editor for live rendering feedback

capability_gaps.name: AI_IMAGE_MODEL
capability_gaps.description: High-quality sprite generation requires a diffusion model (e.g., SDXL-Turbo)
capability_gaps.requires: GPU + Stable Diffusion API or local model

strict_gap_audit.summary: Major development sprint completed all 7 pending code tasks (TASK-013 through TASK-019). All 481 tests pass with zero regressions. Remaining gaps are limited to external dependencies (GPU/Unity) and optional API key configuration. The project's three-loop architecture is now functionally complete at the code level.
key_findings: TASK-016 DONE: Autonomous stagnation now correctly diagnoses, reports, and safely halts instead of auto-recovering.
TASK-013 DONE: FD gradient optimizer provides CPU-only acceleration as a post-EA refinement step.
TASK-019 DONE: Evolution CLI now supports texture, sprite, and animation targets.
TASK-018 DONE: Level-aware export is now accessible through mathart-export --from-level CLI.
TASK-014 DONE: Image-to-Math inference generates parameter seeds from reference images.
TASK-017 DONE: Community sources (Papers with Code, Shadertoy, LLM) extend Loop 3 discovery.
TASK-015 DONE: Scaffold graduation workflow validates models through candidate/experimental/stable lifecycle.
All code-level gaps from SESSION-015 are now resolved. External dependencies remain the only blockers.

evolution_history.notes: Major architecture upgrade: self-evolving brain system fully operational

TEXTURE gap closed, workspace management operational, 10 math models
Audit & task integration: comprehensive requirement review, task deduplication, expanded scopes, added TASK-008, recorded core vision with three-loop architecture
Completed TASK-001 and TASK-009: added mathart-evolve run, integrated mid_generation checkpoint into InnerLoopRunner, added scipy-free QC fallback, and extended regression coverage.
Completed TASK-010: upgraded EvolutionaryOptimizer with adaptive GA controls, elite-guided local search, random immigrants, cma_es_like sampling, and expanded regression coverage.
Completed TASK-011: connected MathPaperMiner to real arXiv and GitHub APIs.
Completed TASK-003: connected LevelSpecBridge to AssetExporter with level-aware export validation.
Completed TASK-012: closed the math-mining loop to registry-backed scaffolds.
Strict completion audit: reframed earlier tasks, added TASK-016 through TASK-019.
End-of-day strict audit refresh. Confirmed pending task backlog.

Major development sprint: completed all 7 pending code tasks (TASK-013 through TASK-019). Added FD gradient optimizer, safe-halt strategy, multi-target evolution CLI, level-aware export CLI, Image-to-Math inference, community source extensions, and scaffold graduation workflow. 481 tests passing with zero regressions.
